name: Anima
description:
After losing a player combat, gain 15 Tech, plus 5 Tech per loss-streak length. Gain 2 Tech per Anima takedown. Each time Animas reach 100 Tech, prototype new Anima Weapons — take them now or save Tech for more powerful ones.

(3) Start Researching!
(6) After winning, gain a loot Orb!

breakpoints.effect: After winning, gain a loot Orb!

name: Arbiter
description:
Scribe a unique divine law, allowing you to choose an effect to apply to Arbiters when a chosen cause occurs.

(2) Choose a cause and effect for your law
(3) Effects are stronger.

breakpoints.effect: Choose a cause and effect for your law

name: Arcana
description: Every 3 rounds, Tahm Kench grants a reward!

breakpoints.effect: Every 3 rounds, Tahm Kench grants a reward!

name: Dark Star
description:
(2) Dark Stars create a black hole that consumes enemies at 10% max health.
(4) AND they gain 33% Attack Damage & Ability Power.
(6) AND the strongest Dark Star unit goes supermassive, gaining 100% effectiveness from Dark Star, and creates 2 minor Black Holes.
(9) All Dark Stars are supermassive. At level 10, CONSUME EVERYONE.

breakpoints.effect: Black hole consumes enemies at 10% HP
Strongest Dark Star goes supermassive + 2 minor Black Holes
All Dark Stars supermassive; at lvl 10 consume everyone

name: Mecha
description:
Innate: Mecha units can transform into their Ultimate form, upgrading their ability and gaining 60% Health. Transformed Mechas take up two team slots and count twice for the Mecha trait.

(3) Energy Cells: Mechas gain 20% AD & AP
(4) Overclocked Cells: Increased to 35% AD & AP
(6) Precision Engineering: +1 max team size

breakpoints.effect: Energy Cells: Mechas gain 20% AD & AP

name: Meeple
description:
Meeple attract Meeps that empower Meeple abilities in meepy ways. They also gain bonus Health.

(3) 2 Potential, 100 Health
(5) 3 Potential, 300 Health
(7) 4 Potential, 300 Health. Create a Cloning Slot on your bench. Gain gold and a 1-star copy of the champion placed there when cloning completes.
(10) 6 Potential, 500 Health. SUMMON THE FOUR MEEPLORDS!

Cloning time = Champion cost

breakpoints.effect: 6 Potential, +500 Health. SUMMON THE FOUR MEEPLORDS!

name: N.O.V.A.
description:
(2) 6 seconds into combat, N.O.V.A. grant a power surge to allies based on champions.
• Aatrox: Ally Damage 30% Shred and Sunder enemies
• Caitlyn: Grant allies 20% Attack Speed
• Akali: Allies gain Precision
• Maokai: Allies heal 15% max Health
• Kindred: Shield the strongest Tank for 800
• Emblem: Allies deal 10% stacking bonus true damage

(5) Gain a Striker selector. The chosen N.O.V.A. activates their Strike during the power surge.

breakpoints.effect: Power surge based on N.O.V.A. champions on board
Gain Striker selector; chosen N.O.V.A. activates Strike in surge

name: Primordian
description:
Dealing damage spawns Swarmlings based on Primordian star level. 8% of damage taken contributes to damage dealt.

(2) Spawn Swarmlings based on star level
(3) Spawn even more Swarmlings! Each round, gain a random 1 or 2-cost champion.

breakpoints.effect: Spawn Swarmlings on damage; 8% dmg taken → dmg dealt
More Swarmlings + gain a free 1 or 2-cost champion each round

name: Psionic
description:
Gain Psionic items that can be equipped to any ally.

(2) Gain Psionic item 1
(4) Gain Psionic item 2; Psionic items gain extra effects on Psionic units.

breakpoints.effect: Gain Psionic item 1 (equip on any ally)
Gain Psionic item 2; bonus effects on Psionic units

name: Space Groove
description:
(1) Groovians can enter The Groove. While in it, they gain Attack Speed and max Health Regen, increased per Groovian on your team.
(3) All Groovians start combat in The Groove for 3 seconds.
(5) Each second spent in The Groove grants 3% stacking Attack Damage and Ability Power.
(7) Increase these effects by 10%!
(10) Get your Groove on!

breakpoints.effect: Groovians can enter the Groove (AS + HP Regen)
All Groovians start combat in the Groove for 3s
+3% stacking AD & AP per second in the Groove

name: Stargazer
description: Stargazers chart a different constellation every game. Stargazers in empowered hexes gain various bonuses, starting at (3) units. More hexes reveal at each player level.

name: Timebreaker
description:
When you lose, gain free rerolls. When you win, store XP in a Temporal Core (scales with stage).

(2) Free rerolls on loss; XP stored on win
(3) AND Allies gain 15% Attack Speed
(4) AND Timebreakers gain an additional 50% Attack Speed

breakpoints.effect: Free rerolls on loss; store XP on win
AND Timebreakers gain +50% additional Attack Speed

name: Bastion
description:
Your team gains 15 Armor and Magic Resist. Bastions gain more, and the value doubles in the first 10 seconds of combat.

(2) 16 Armor & MR
(4) 40 Armor & MR
(6) 60 Armor & MR; Non-Bastions gain an additional 20 Armor & MR.

breakpoints.effect: 60 Armor & MR; Non-Bastions gain +20 Armor & MR too

name: Brawler
description:
Your team gains 5% Health. Brawlers gain more.

(2) +20% maximum Health
(4) +40% maximum Health
(6) +60% maximum Health

name: Challenger
description:
Your team gains 10% Attack Speed. Challengers gain bonus Attack Speed. When their target dies, Challengers dash to a new target and increase their Attack Speed bonus by 50% for 2.5 seconds.

(2) 15% Attack Speed
(3) 22% Attack Speed
(4) 30% Attack Speed
(5) 40% Attack Speed

name: Channeler
description:
Innate: Channelers gain 20% additional Mana from all sources.

Your team gains Mana Regen, increased for Channelers.

(2) 1% Mana Regen | 3% for Channelers
(3) 1% Mana Regen | 4% for Channelers
(4) 2% Mana Regen | 6% for Channelers
(5) 2% Mana Regen | 7% for Channelers

name: Fateweaver
description:
Innate: Fateweavers have Precision.

(2) Chance effects on abilities are Lucky.
(4) Gain 20% Crit Chance and 20% Crit Damage. Critical strikes are also Lucky.

Precision: Ability damage can critically strike. Additional Precision grants 10% Critical Strike Damage.
Lucky: Check twice and take the better outcome.

breakpoints.effect: Chance effects on abilities are Lucky
+20% Crit Chance, +20% Crit Dmg; crits are also Lucky

name: Marauder
description:
Your team gains 5% Omnivamp. Marauders gain more Omnivamp, Attack Damage, and their Omnivamp overhealing is converted into Shield (up to 25% max Health.)

(2) 5% Omnivamp, 20% AD
(4) 7% Omnivamp, 35% AD
(6) 10% Omnivamp, 50% AD

name: Replicator
description:
Replicator abilities occur a second time at reduced effectiveness.

(2) 22% strength
(4) 45% strength

breakpoints.effect: Abilities fire a second time at 22% strength
Abilities fire a second time at 45% strength

name: Rogue
description:
Rogues gain Attack Damage and Ability Power. The first time they fall below 50% health, they slip into shadows. Enemies targeting them are redirected to a nearby unit, preferring Tanks.

(2) 15% AD & AP
(3) 30% AD & AP
(4) 45% AD & AP
(5) 60% AD & AP

breakpoints.effect: 15% AD & AP; 1st time below 50% HP → slip into shadows

name: Shepherd
description:
Shepherds summon the Bond of the Stars to aid them in battle.

(3) Summon Bia
(5) Summon Bayin
(7) Bia and Bayin's bond grows deeper

Bia and Bayin's power are increased by the total star level of all Shepherds.

breakpoints.effect: Summon Bia (power scales with Shepherd star levels)
Bia and Bayin's bond grows deeper

name: Sniper
description:
Snipers gain Damage Amplification, increased against targets farther away.

(2) 18% Damage Amplification; +2% Damage Amplification per hex
(3) 24% Damage Amplification; +3% Damage Amplification per hex
(4) 28% Damage Amplification; +4% Damage Amplification per hex

name: Vanguard
description:
Vanguards gain 5% Durability while Shielded. Combat start and 50% Health: Gain a max Health Shield for 10 seconds.

(2) 16% max Health
(4) 30% max Health
(6) 40% max Health; 10% Damage Reduction while Shielded

breakpoints.effect: 16% max HP Shield at combat start & 50% HP
40% max HP Shield + 10% DR while Shielded

name: Voyager
description:
Combat Start: Your Tanks and Fighters gain a Shield for 15 seconds. Your other allies gain Damage Amp. Voyagers gain double.

(2) 175 Shield; 9% DA
(3) 250 Shield; 15% DA
(4) 350 Shield; 18% DA
(5) 500 Shield; 22% DA
(6) 700 Shield; 27% DA

name: Bulwark
description: Summon a placeable relic. At the start of combat, it grants adjacent allies a 18% max Health shield and 20% Attack Speed.

breakpoints.effect: 18% max Health shield + 20% Attack Speed to adjacent allies

name: Commander
description: Sona gives you a random Command Mod every 2 rounds which allows you to alter the way an ally behaves during combat. Command Mods last 2 player combats even if they are not equipped.

breakpoints.effect: Random Command Mod every 2 rounds; lasts 2 combats unequipped

name: Dark Lady
description: Allies take 5% less damage from abilities, increased to 10% while Morgana is in Dark Form.

breakpoints.effect: 5% ability dmg reduction (10% in Morgana's Dark Form)

name: Divine Duelist
description: You heal for 15% of player damage you deal. Fiora always wins a one on one duel.

breakpoints.effect: Heal 15% of player dmg dealt; Fiora wins every 1v1

name: Doomer
description: Combat Start: Mark all enemies with Doom. The first time enemies are damaged each combat, their Doom is consumed, stealing 8% Attack Damage and Ability Power from them and granting it to your strongest Vex.

breakpoints.effect: Steal 8% AD & AP from all enemies on first hit → Vex

name: Eradicator
description: Enemies have 14% less Armor and Magic Resist.

breakpoints.effect: All enemies have 14% less Armor & Magic Resist

name: Factory New
description: After participating in combat, open an armory to purchase a permanent upgrade for your strongest Graves. Every 3 upgrades, future upgrades will take an additional round.

breakpoints.effect: After each combat, armory opens for a permanent Graves upgrade

name: Galaxy Hunter
description: Zed is obtained from the Invader Zed augment. While at least one clone is alive, Zed gains 40% bonus Attack Damage.

breakpoints.effect: +40% AD while at least one clone is alive

name: Gun Goddess
description: When you field Miss Fortune, choose between Channeler Mode, Challenger Mode, and Replicator Mode. Miss Fortune has a unique ability based on her mode and gains the associated trait.

name: Party Animal
description: Once per combat, after falling below 45% Health, Blitzcrank becomes untargetable and repairs 15% max Health per second. Upon reaching full Health, or when no other allies remain, he returns to combat. If fully healed, he enters The Groove for the rest of combat and Party Crasher's passive fires bolts four times as fast.

breakpoints.effect: Below 45% HP: untargetable, repair 15% HP/s; if full → The Groove + 4x bolt speed

name: Redeemer
description: For each non-unique trait you have active, your team gains 2%/3%/4% Attack Speed and 2/3/4 Armor and Magic Resist.

breakpoints.effect: +2%/3%/4% AS and +2/3/4 Armor & MR per active non-unique trait
